name: Easy Bake Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan with butter.
3. In a heavy saucepan, combine butter and brown sugar. Heat over medium until boiling.
4. Stir in chopped pecans. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over toffee.
7. Let cool completely, then break into pieces.
8. Store in an airtight container.
